creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
x11-servers/xwayland is an old port based on combined xorg+xwayland+etc release. For newer standalone version that ships xwayland.pc use x11-servers/xwayland-devel, similar to ports 09721d1275ee.

$ pkg info -l xwayland-devel
xwayland-devel-21.0.99.1.196:
        /usr/local/bin/Xwayland
        /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/xwayland.pc
        /usr/local/man/man1/Xwayland.1.gz
        /usr/local/share/licenses/xwayland-devel-21.0.99.1.196/LICENSE
        /usr/local/share/licenses/xwayland-devel-21.0.99.1.196/MIT
        /usr/local/share/licenses/xwayland-devel-21.0.99.1.196/catalog.mk
